title: PEX Equivalence: Spout In-Engine PEX == MAGIC PEX (C count within 5% for all circuits)

stories.title: Model internal diffusion nodes (shared S/D junctions)
acceptanceCriteria: For each net with source/drain pins from >=2 different devices, virtual diffusion nodes are created
folded_cascode substrate cap count increases from 6 toward 12
sar_adc substrate cap count increases from 4 toward 7
No regression on diff_pair C count (currently 22 vs 23 MATCH)

stories.title: Refine device-pin coupling model selectivity
acceptanceCriteria: Same-device coupling restricted to gate<->drain and gate<->source pairs only
Cross-device coupling restricted to physically adjacent pins (<3um)
five_transistor_ota C count decreases from 6 toward 5
current_mirror C count stays close to 6

stories.title: Coupling from internal diffusion nodes to neighboring signal nets
acceptanceCriteria: Virtual diffusion nodes participate in coupling with adjacent signal nets
folded_cascode total C count moves toward 25 (from 11)
sar_adc total C count moves toward 16 (from 8)
Total coupling cap counts increase proportionally to added diffusion nodes

stories.title: All 5 benchmark circuits pass C count within 5%
acceptanceCriteria: compare_pex.py -c current_mirror diff_pair five_transistor_ota folded_cascode sar_adc_comparator exits 0 (using nix develop .#test)
All C count ratios between 0.95x and 1.05x
No ERROR results for any circuit
